- [TCoU Heart Leather Necklace Represents Love & Light](https://tcou.net/products/tcou-heart-leather-necklace-represents-love-light): The leather necklace with small metal charm and message ring is intended to help wearer and those around them be aware of peace that exists within their own hearts. Genuine leather Necklace, Zinc Alloy-Silver Heart with small crystal and TCoU logo, message ring for love & light, with pull tie closure. This necklace may be used as a diffuser of aromatherapy oils or perfume/colognes. Apply a couple of drops or spray the back of the leather heart. Over-saturation will cause leather to darken. Do not wet metal parts. Store in its own velvety TCoU bag.

- [Journal, Let's Do This!!!](https://tcou.net/products/journal-lets-do-this-shop-229488-7551): Meet a journal with a backbone and a wink. This is not a passive notebook waiting politely for thoughts to wander in. It is determined, upbeat, and quietly stubborn about your growth. Each page feels like a friendly nudge forward, mixing encouragement with momentum, turning small intentions into daily wins. What better way to quiet your racing mind than with a clean slate? The Let's Do It!! Leather Journal is the perfect accessory for personal reminders, goal setting, or just getting organized. This vegan leather notebook allows you to write on the go thanks to its lightweight design. Plus, swapping between your important pages is easy thanks to the ribbon bookmark and elastic closure band. The unique front is professionally printed with vibrant colors - making your design last as long as your to-do list! Your journal will be custom made upon order and feature a professionally printed design. This present makes for a truly unique and sentimental gift that will be treasured! Product specifications: Vegan leather cover W 5.8" x L 8.5" x ⅝” (14.73cm x 21.59cm x 1.6cm) 100 sheets / 200 lined pages Brown elastic closure band Ribbon bookmark Weight: 11.33 ounces Each order is lovingly packaged and shipped with care!

- [TCoU--Take Care of You -- Love Heart Sunset Accent Coffee Mug – Perfect to start your Morning choose from 11/15 oz. and many colors](https://tcou.net/products/coffee-mug-sunset-tcou-heart-hands-design-accent-11-15oz): Early-morning gold, warm hands, the slow hush of water with the soft reminder to TCoU-Take Care of You— this ceramic mug carries that quiet moment with you. A silhouetted pair of hands shapes a heart against a glowing sunrise, the image wrapping around a glossy white mug with a bold black interior and handle. It’s for those who collect small rituals: a first sip on a balcony, a pause before the day begins, or a shared laugh over coffee at sunset. The rich, photographic print keeps the scene vivid, while the comfortable C-handle and two size options mean this mug easily slides into weekday routines or relaxed weekend rituals. Dishwasher- and microwave-safe, with a lead- and BPA-free finish, it’s built to brighten everyday moments without fuss.Product features- Microwave-safe ceramic for reheating drinks.- Dishwasher-safe glossy finish that holds vibrant colors.- Available in 11 oz and 15 oz sizes with colored interior and handle.- Comfortable C-shaped handle; lead- and BPA-free material.- High-definition photo print with eye-catching color contrast.Care instructions- Clean in dishwasher or wash by hand with warm water and dish soap

- [Don't  Cuz' I'm A Little Cooler - T-shirt](https://tcou.net/products/dont--cuz-im-a-little-cooler-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [Kindness Is Free But So Is Disrespect Watch Your Mouth Tee](https://tcou.net/products/kindness-is-free-but-so-is-disrespect-watch-your-mouth-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [This Is Not Time To Be Sober Tee](https://tcou.net/products/this-is-not-time-to-be-sober-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [It's me Hi I'm The Trouble Maker Tee](https://tcou.net/products/its-me-hi-im-the-trouble-maker-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [Jesus Loves This Hot Mess, T-Shirt](https://tcou.net/products/jesus-loves-this-hot-mess-tee): Classic Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [Much Too Young To Feel This Damn Old T-shirt](https://tcou.net/products/much-too-young-to-feel-this-damn-old-tee): Classic Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [T-shirt, Loyalty Is When You Have My Back, Behind My Back!](https://tcou.net/products/loyalty-is-when-you-have-my-back-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

- [TCoU - 'Love' - Heart Necklace](https://tcou.net/products/tcou-love-heart-necklace): This TCoU small engraved heart necklace is quiet and thoughtful — a sliver of everyday jewelry that carries meaning. The surgical-grade stainless steel heart sits on a delicate cable chain, its laser-etched TCoU logo, holds a private message without shouting. Wear it alone as a subtle reminder to always "Take Care of You", or layer it with textured chains for a richer, personal look. The metal’s polished surface and clean engraving ages well, keeping the sentiment readable through daily wear. Comfortable against skin and unlikely to irritate, it moves easily from morning coffee to late-night walks, holding a small story close to the collarbone.Product features- 316L surgical stainless steel for long-lasting corrosion resistance- Hypoallergenic construction suited for sensitive skin- Laser engraving creates a permanent, crisp design- Compact heart pendant: 16 x 14 mm (0.63" x 0.55")- PVD-coated options available; sourced blank from ChinaCare instructions- Wipe the dust or any dirt off gently with a clean, dry cloth.

- [Find Your Happy Tee — Inspirational 'Find Your Happy' Motivational T-Shirt](https://tcou.net/products/find-your-happy-tee-inspirational-find-your-happy-motivational-t-shirt): This lightweight tee quietly encourages a gentler, more intentional day. Soft Airlume cotton sits close to the skin, carrying the simple reminder—Find Your Happy—like a small, steady compass. Wear it on morning walks, between meetings, or curled up with a book; the message nudges you to notice what brings peace and satisfaction and to make space for it. The retail cut keeps the silhouette clean so the words remain the focus. Built to move with you, it pairs naturally with denim, leggings, or a layered cardigan when the light falls late and you need a moment of calm.Product features- 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton for a soft, breathable feel- Retail fit with ribbed knit crew neckline for a clean, versatile silhouette- Side seams and shoulder tape for shape retention and durable wear- Tear-away label to minimize skin irritation; REACH - Sleeve and neck prints applied with DTF/DTG techniques for crisp, vibrant designsCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F) -- do not bleach- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat- Do not dryclean

- [MOUSE PAD-TCoU- Take Care of YOU -- Heart - Hands Mouse Pad with Ergonomic Wrist Rest — ‘TCoU’ Infinity Love Design](https://tcou.net/products/tcou-take-care-of-you-heart-hands-mouse-pad-with-ergonomic-wrist-rest-tcou-infinity-love-design): A soft, supportive mouse pad that brings a little comfort to long desk sessions. The white surface showcases a tender image of hands forming a heart around a faceted red gem and TCoU Logo. The memory foam wrist rest cushions your wrist, reducing strain during focused work or late-night browsing. The neoprene insert sits recessed into a small mound-shaped black plastic base and can be lifted out for easy cleaning or replacement. Use it at your home desk, study nook, or anywhere you want a small, daily reminder of taking care of you and you are not alone to give you hope while you work.Product features- Removable neoprene insert for easy cleaning- Vivid sublimation print for bright, crisp colors- Ergonomic Memory Foam™ wrist support- One-size: 9.17" x 10.15" (25.8 x 23.3 cm)- Foot-shaped semi-opaque black plastic base with recessed insertCare instructions- Use warm water and dish soap to clean spots off your pad. It's not necessary to soak the whole pad. For hard-to-clean spots use a soft-bristled brush.

- ['Be You' -- Butterfly Hands Inspirational Wall Art--Matte Stretched Canvas](https://tcou.net/products/be-you-butterfly-hands-inspirational-wall-art-matte-stretched-canvas): A matte stretched canvas that brings a quiet, intentional moment into any room. A pair of decorated hands cradles a colorful butterfly whose wings spell out “BE YOU,” surrounded by tiny symbols and words that invite presence and self-acceptance. The matte finish softens glare and keeps the colors rich yet gentle, while the slim 1.25" profile gives a modern, gallery-style presence on the wall. It hangs flush and steady thanks to soft rubber dots and included back hanging hardware, so it settles easily into a bedroom, meditation nook, studio, or living room where reflection is welcome.Product features- Matte, stretched canvas with 1.25" gallery depth- Printed with UL- Greenguard Gold latex inks for vivid, non-toxic color- Stretched on FSC-sourced radiata pine inner frame- Soft rubber dots on back plus included hanging hardware for steady display- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; slight size tolerance +/- 1/8"Care instructions- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth.

It’s calm, comforting, and a tiny wearable reminder of self love and care.Product is: - Made from a 50/50 cotton-poly blend (8.0 oz/yd²) for balanced warmth and breathability.- No side seams (tubular knit) and ribbed collar for better fit and reduced fabric waste.- Safety- and eco-conscious: OEKO-TEX dyes, US Cotton Trust Protocol, and compliance with flammability and heavy-metal standards.Care instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Tumble dry: low heat- Do not iron- Do not drycleanEU representative: HONSON VENTURES LIMITED, gpsr@honsonventures.com, 3, Gnaftis House flat 102, Limassol, Mesa Geitonia, 4003, CY Product information: Gildan 18000, 2 year warranty in EU and Northern Ireland as per Directive 1999/44/EC Warnings, Hazard: Made in Nicaragua, For adults Care instructions: Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), Non-chlorine: bleach as needed, Tumble dry: low heat, Do not iron, Do not dryclean

- [Hardcover Journal – Rainbow of hands Silhouette, making a Heart Design -- TCoU -- Beacon Hope - Candle Logo](https://tcou.net/products/hardcover-journal-rainbow-of-hands-silhouette-making-a-heart-design-tcou-beacon-hope-candle-logo): This hardcover journal brings energy and purpose to every page. A matte laminated cover holds a bold, wraparound graphic — a colorful, curved, Rainbow of hands Silhouette, making a Heart Design -- with a TCoU -- Beacon Hope - Candle Logo, against a deep black field, evoking creative bursts. Inside, 150 lined pages (75 sheets) lie on a flexible sewn spine that opens flat for easy writing. Perforated sheets let you tear out notes or sketches without damaging the binding, while vivid printing keeps the neon hues bright over time. Carry it to rehearsals, meetings, or quiet desk sessions; use it for set lists, planning, or freewriting. The compact, durable build stands up to daily wear and keeps your ideas safe.Product features- Matte laminated cover for a smooth, durable finish- Full wraparound bright print with vibrant, crisp colors- Casewrap (sewn) binding that opens flat and adds flexibility- 150 lined pages (75 sheets) with perforations for easy removal- Matte finish; small production barcode on back coverCare instructions- Use a soft, clean and dry cloth to gently brush any dust or dirt off from the center of book outwards.

For Boys & Girls--ships from NNECW in Australia Good Companion for Traveling & Schooling! Our 2-piece kids carry-on luggage set includes an 18" (45.72cm) ride-on hardshell suitcase and a 12" (30.48cm) backpack. and it weighs only 5.5 lbs., making it suitable for kids to enjoy a vacation, go to school, attend summer camp, go out for a picnic, and more. The hardshell suitcase comes with internal cross straps and a zippered storage pocket for books, clothes, toys, snacks, toiletries, etc., and the backpack comes with 2 compartments and a stretch mesh bottle pocket for easy access. In contrast to normal suitcases, this travel suitcase can meet the needs of both ride-on and sit-on use. Parents can also carry it on their shoulders with the carrying strap or by hand for easy movement. Thanks to the retractable handle and rotatable casters, kids can easily move it around on their own. Most importantly, our luggage set is equipped with an anti-loss rope that lets you connect it to the suitcase for easy pulling or to a backpack for loss prevention, greatly enhancing safety. Besides, the ride-on suitcase features beautiful bee patterns, and the backpack with decorative plush wings is shaped like a bee, which can encourage your kids to pack their luggage themselves. Highlights: Roomy Storage Space: The 2-PC kids’ luggage set includes an 18" (45.72cm) ride-on hardshell suitcase and a 12" (30.48cm) backpack, providing ample storage space. Moreover, there are cross straps and a zippered storage pocket to keep items in place, and the backpack features a stretch mesh pocket for storing water bottles. The luggage set is also airline- for carry-on. Multifunctional Design: This luggage set provides multiple ways to use according to your needs: kids can sit on it when stuck in long lines, providing a comfortable sitting experience; Kids can ride on it for adding more fun with comfortable footrests; Kids can also pull to move the suitcase, which is easy to move around while saving labor; Moreover, the luggage set can be carried on the shoulder or by hand for convenience. Anti-Lose Rope & Adjustable Carrying Strap: The travel rolling luggage includes an anti-lose rope that can connect to the ride-on suitcase for easy pulling or to the backpack to prevent loss, ensuring good safety. Furthermore, it comes with an adjustable carrying strap, suitable for kids and adults of different sizes and shoulder widths. Spinner Wheels & Retractable Handle: The hardshell suitcase features 2 front universal wheels and 2 large rear wheels that are silent, smooth, and effortless to move. And the package weighs only 5.5 lbs. (2.49kg), so it won't burden your little one during school or travel. Moreover, the retractable handle can be adjusted to 3 positions to suit kids’ heights. Premium Material & Stylish Appearance: The hardshell is made of waterproof, anti-scratch PC and ABS; the pulling rod is made of solid, lightweight aluminum; and the backpack is made of tear- and wear-resistant polyester fabric, ensuring long-term use. Other than that, with its cute bee patterns, funny bee shapes, and decorative plush wings, this luggage set can be a perfect gift for your children. Features: 4-in-1 multifunctional design: sit-on, ride-on, pull-to-move, and carry-on Perfect size to put in the overhead compartment of the plane or under the seat Designed with a 58.5 in. (148.59cm) anti-lose rope for pulling a suitcase and preventing loss Designed with a 58.5 in. (113.03cm) adjustable and detachable carrying strap, making it easy to carry around. Comes with compartments in the suitcase and backpack to classify travel essentials The sit-on suitcase provides comfortable sitting and features convenient footrests. The aluminum retractable handle can be adjusted to suit kids of different heights. 2-way smooth zippers with lock holes to ensure security when traveling. The wide and comfortable shoulder straps with adjustable strap buckles help reduce the burden on the kids’ shoulders. Secure Detachable Holder for AirTag (AirTag Not Included) The cardholder wallet has an external holder designed for AirTag. Protect your credit, debit, and ID cards from electronic pickpocketing. - [Rideable Children's Suitcase Jungle Friends--by MILK&MOO](https://tcou.net/products/milk-moo-rideable-childrens-suitcase-jungle-friends): Milk&Moo Rideable Kids Suitcase Jungle Friends The Milk&Moo Rideable Kids' Suitcase Jungle Friends is a specially designed product that makes the travel experience more enjoyable for young adventurers. This suitcase allows children to travel comfortably without being separated from their toys while they are on vacation with their parents. DURABLE AND SAFE: The rideable kids' suitcase is made from solid materials and features an ergonomic seating area for your child's comfort. Its strong structure ensures your child's safety and durability, withstanding any challenges encountered on the road. RIDEABLE DESIGN The bottom of the suitcase features a foldable footrest where your child can place their feet, and it also has wheels that let them move around while sitting on it. Your child can either pull the suitcase or ride on it comfortably, making long walks at the airport or bus terminal easy and fatigue-free. SPACIOUS INTERIOR: The rideable kids' suitcase offers ample interior space where your child can store all the items they might need during their travels. Toys, clothes, and other personal belongings can be easily accommodated. The zippered pocket inside allows them to carry small items without mixing them up. FUN DESIGN: With our original Jungle Friends design, using our favorite shades of purple, the rideable kids' suitcase will be your children's delightful travel companion, adding excitement to their journey. TRAVEL CONVENIENCE: The rideable kids' suitcase is designed to ease the parents' burden during travel. It comes with an adjustable shoulder strap for easy carrying, and parents can pull or push the suitcase while their child is riding on it. Additionally, the suitcase has top handles for effortless hand-carrying. Your kids will love these designs! Whether it's a long or short journey, traveling with compatible suitcases will now be more enjoyable for your children and you. With the rideable suitcase, your kids will have enjoyable moments and won't struggle to carry their belongings. How about trying out the suitcases designed by the Milk&Moo family? Rideable Suitcase Features: • Rideable suitcase • Foldable footrest • Front wheels that swivel 360 degrees for unique maneuverability • Top handle for the child to hold onto while riding • Adjustable shoulder strap for carrying and pulling • Hand-carrying handle • Vibrant surface print • Two-way zippered feature with star-shaped zipper pulls • Spacious interior • Milk&Moo logo lining and zippered compartment inside • Zippered interior pocket for small items • Clip-on inner elastic bands to prevent items from shifting Dimensions: Product Size: 45*21*31 cm / 17*8*12 in Capacity: approximately 21 L / 110 Lb Net Weight: 1.6 kg / 3,5 Lb Suitable for the children aged 2-6 years old Maximum riding weight: 50 kg / 110 Lb Care and Use: Material: ABS+PC Interior lining: 100% polyester Clean the suitcase with a damp cloth without using harmful chemicals. Remove the transparent protective film from the suitcase before use. Use the suitcase on flat surfaces and under parental supervision. It is not suitable for use on escalators or inclined surfaces. In case of any issues with the product due to manufacturing defects, Milk&Moo will, at its discretion, repair or replace the product. This warranty is valid only for the initial purchaser or gift recipient. Damages resulting from misuse (e.g., carrying unusual items), neglect, accidents, wear and tear, exposure to extreme temperatures, solvents, acids, water, normal wear and tear, or transportation damage (airline-related damages) are not covered. Designed in Turkey.

- [Speaker--Waterproof Shower, Wireless, Portable Speaker – Bluetooth Speaker](https://tcou.net/products/waterproof-wireless-speaker-portable-bluetooth-shower-speaker): Take your music anywhere with the Purvolt Waterproof Wireless Speaker, designed for powerful sound and everyday durability. Whether you're in the shower, by the pool, or exploring the outdoors, this compact speaker delivers clear, immersive audio in a rugged, water-resistant design that keeps up with your lifestyle. Engineered with 360° Hi-Res stereo sound, it surrounds you with rich, balanced audio—bringing your favorite playlists to life wherever you are. The Bluetooth 5.0 technology ensures fast, stable pairing with your devices, so you can stream seamlessly without interruptions. Built for convenience, this speaker features a lightweight, portable design with an integrated strap, making it easy to hang, carry, or take on the go. The IPX4 water-resistant protection means it can handle splashes, rain, and humid environments with ease—perfect for bathrooms, beaches, or outdoor adventures. Key Features • IPX4 Water-Resistant Protection – Safe for splashes, rain, and wet environments• Bluetooth 5.0 Connectivity – Quick, stable, and easy pairing• 360° Hi-Res Sound – Immersive audio from every angle• Hands-Free Calling – Built-in microphone for convenience• Up to 3 Hours Playtime – Reliable battery for everyday listening• Portable with Strap – Easy to carry, hang, or travel with• Modern Color Options – Available in Blue and White Enjoy music without limits—anytime, anywhere—with the Purvolt Waterproof Wireless Speaker.

{text-align: right; cursor: pointer; display:none;} The Chirp Wheel XR 4 inch is designed for pinpoint trigger point relief, this wheel applies focused pressure to ease muscle tension—ideal for foam rolling, Pilates, and physical therapy. Prepare yourself for an extraordinary and captivating journey, that unfolds as you carefully position the specially designed nodes at the foundation of your skull. As you settle into a state of deep relaxation, anticipate the gradual dissipation of accumulated tension, resulting in a truly transformative experience where stress and discomfort are gently but definitively ushered away, leaving you serene tranquility. Penetrating to the depths where your body requires utmost attention, this innovative texture emulates the sensation of skilled thumbs applying profound pressure to your muscle tissue, effectively addressing those areas that demand intensive care and relief. It exerts a gentle traction force along the spine, providing a soothing massage to the surrounding muscles through a pronounced contour, effectively emulating the sensation of a thorough acupressure therapy session. The Chirp Wheel XR combines soft yet supportive cushioning to strike the perfect balance between comfort and therapeutic effectiveness, much like a firm or medium-density foam roller. Constructed from premium materials for lasting durability, its compact size makes it as portable as a travel foam roller—perfect for workouts or therapy on the go. Ideal for athletes or anyone seeking a deep massager for muscles that targets stiffness and restores flexibility. VERSATILE MUSCLE RECOVERY TOOL: Beyond back rolling, the XR works as a roller muscle massage device for the entire body. Use it on your back, arms, thighs, calves, or feet for full-body relief, giving you professional-level recovery at home or on the go. COMFORTABLE YET FIRM: With its unique balance of firmness and cushioning, the Chirp Wheel XR provides controlled pressure without compromising comfort. Its durable foam surface stays supportive while allowing you to ease into deep tissue rolling at your own pace. BUILT FOR DEEPER, FOCUSED PRESSURE: Engineered with a firmer core and textured design, the Chirp Wheel XR delivers controlled, targeted pressure where you need it most. Perfect for users seeking more intensity than traditional rollers, supporting spine decompression and mobility. BUILT FOR STRENGTH & TRAVEL: Constructed with a tough inner core and high-quality foam exterior, the Chirp Wheel XR is designed for repeated use without losing shape. Its lightweight build and compact size make it easy to store, carry, and take with you anywhere you need relief.

Our peach creatine supplement is specifically formulated for women to help support muscle, particularly in the glutes and Glute. REFRESHING PINK LEMONADE FLAVOR, NOT CHALKY POWDER: Our pink lemonade is delicious and easy to drink, making it a convenient and enjoyable way to supplement your workouts. Because we use a high grade of micronized creatine monohydrate your drink will not be sandy, gritty or chalky at all. BYE BLOAT, HELLO Glute: Say bye to the bloat because we use micronized creatine monohydrate with a high dissolvability. Peach Perfect is made with pure Creatine that is 250% finer than traditional monohydrate. Creatine is the most studied supplement in the market, supporting energy, and muscle. WHY PEACH PERFECT IS ESSENTIAL: By supplementing with creatine, studies have shown you may experience increased strength and power, allowing you to lift heavier weights and push harder during your workouts. And finally with the added Collagen for skin health benefits. 100% HAPPINESS PROMISED: Peach Perfect partners with quality manufacturers to top tier labs/universities to bring you the most cutting edge ingredients on the market. With a full-length zipper, you can easily access your mat and gear, allowing you to arrive at your sessions organized and worry-free. The adjustable shoulder strap ensures a customizable, hands-free fit, so you can carry your mat comfortably while walking, cycling, or traveling. Designed with ample storage, the bag features a roomy front pocket and a secure back pocket with a dedicated earbud slit, perfect for stowing your essentials like your phone, keys, or yoga accessories. This practical design keeps your belongings within reach, making your transition from home to practice absolutely seamless. For cleaning & maintenance, we recommend machine washing it in cold water and laying it flat to dry. At Gaiam, we create thoughtfully crafted products to support every stage of your fitness journey. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, our yoga, fitness & wellness products help you stay connected to your practice and fully prepared for your next workout. A CONVENIENT YOGA MAT BAG: Whether you're walking, cycling, hiking or going to your class, carry your exercise mat effortlessly with the Gaiam Yoga Mat Bag. AMPLE STORAGE: The front cargo pocket in this yoga mat carrier is big enough to keep your yoga essentials organized, while the exterior back pocket holds your keys, hair ties, phone & also comes with a slit to keep your earphone wires tangle free CUSTOMIZABLE STRAP: For more flexibility on the go, this yoga mat holder comes with an adjustable shoulder strap to easily customize the length so you can carry the mat your way. Head to the gym, studio or meditation centre completely hands-free YOUR FITNESS GUIDE: We at Gaiam try to embrace every part of our perfectly imperfect selves—especially when it comes to yoga. Formulated according to guidelines from US/CA recommended daily values (with fasting in mind) to help you succeed in your fast while being KETO-friendly and contains zero sugar. SUCCESSFUL FASTING WITH TASTY MEAL: Natural flavors and stevia eases the fasting process by making the drink taste like a meal and more palatable to drink. The great taste of lemon & lime helps you consume more water which is vital during a fast and makes the fasting process more enjoyable. Enjoy this delightful drink and continue to be active while fasting. HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Pink Himalayan Sea salt, potassium chloride, magnesium citrate, and calcium citrate are all high-quality ingredients and common supplements found in capsules or powders taken by people across the world. These widely used ingredients offer better absorption and reduce the likelihood of side effects. SUGGESTED ROUTINE: A 3 day fast followed by 2 days of refeeding is recommended for optimal results. A shorter 1-2 day fast will not require refeeding. Refeeding allows the body to slowly come back from a fasting state and continues the weight loss for a couple more days. Drinking bone broth after a long fast will replenish the body with rich nutrients, good fats, and collagen. 100% USA MADE: 1000mg of Sodium, 1000mg of Potassium, 100mg of Magnesium, and 420mg of Calcium per Serving and tested to be gluten-free and soy-free Ingredients Sodium, Potassium, Magnesium, Calcium

Considering mini 10, small 20, medium 40, large 80. */ WHAT'S IN THE BOX: Meet the Tales Life Story Interview Kit: a quality card deck of 150 expert-crafted questions, interviewing framework, and recording tips & tricks. It's the perfect way to capture and preserve your loved one’s stories and memories and will help you uncover stories and details you never knew. SPECIALLY CURATED DECK OF CARDS: These conversation cards include questions written by our team of expert interviewers and trained narratologists. The cards are divided into three eras of life: Early Life, Mid Life, Later Life, and feature both chronological and reflective questions to spark meaningful conversations. SIMPLE STEP-BY-STEP INSTRUCTIONS: Become a pro interviewer! The Tales Life Story Interview Kit includes easy-to-follow instruction cards that'll help you get loved ones to open up and share their stories, as well as recording tips and tricks for jotting it all down. DURABLE AND PORTABLE DESIGN: Crafted with a 350gsm matte-finish and stored in a sturdy, spot-finish box, these life story interview kit cards are built to last and easy to take anywhere for meaningful storytelling moments on the go. PRESERVE PRICELESS MEMORIES: Life moves too fast, and one day our loved ones are no longer with us — taking their priceless stories and memories along with them. With the Tales Card Deck, you can make sure the stories of your loved ones are captured before it’s too late, ensuring their voice and life lessons live on for generations to come. › See more product details

- [T-Shirt--"I Like To Smile At People Who Don't Like Me"](https://tcou.net/products/i-like-to-smile-at-people-who-dont-like-me-tee): Unisex Jersey Short Sleeve Tee – Timeless Comfort & Style • Perfect Fit: Crafted to feel like a well-loved favorite with a retail fit that adapts to any wardrobe. • Premium Material: Soft cotton with quality printing ensures lasting comfort and vibrant designs. • High-Quality Material: Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton, offering a soft, breathable, and lightweight feel (4.2 oz/yd²). • Durable & Ethical: Manufactured sustainably by Bella+Canvas in the US and internationally, adhering to no-sweatshop and humane labor practices (Platinum WRAP ). • Enhanced Features: o Ribbed Knit Collar: Elastic and durable, retains shape over time. o Shoulder Tape: Stabilizes the back of the garment and prevents stretching. o Side Seams: Maintain structure and provide long-lasting shape. • Custom Printing Options: o Sleeve Printing: High-quality Direct-to-Film (DTF) or Direct-to-Garment (DTG) methods for crisp, vibrant designs. o Neck Label Printing: Detailed and durable designs using DTF or DTG techniques. This versatile tee is ideal for casual wear, layering, and custom printing, making it a go-to favorite for any occasion!

}); })); 【Hardside Structure,Holds Shape】Say goodbye to sagging bags! Rolling teacher bag features 5 built-in hard panels reinforcing the main compartment. This internal frame delivers rock-solid stability—even when packed with thick textbooks or a laptop. Built to last through years of classroom use, it prevents sagging while shielding your gear from bumps and daily wear 【Detachable 360° Spinner 4-Wheels】Wheeled work bag glide effortlessly with four multi-directional 360° spinner wheels that roll smoothly forwards, backwards, and sideways. Navigate tight corners, crowded hallways, and uneven pavement with ease. The detachable pull rod features a 3-level telescoping handle extending to 31.5", comfortably accommodating users over 5'9" 【37L Large Capacity】Sized at 17.7"L × 8.7"W × 12.6"H, this rolling bag provides 37L of organized space for everything you need—from laptops and binders to personal items. Weighing just 6.45 lbs, it strikes the perfect balance between spaciousness and portability. The quilted body paired with PU leather accents adds sophisticated elegance without compromising durability 【Tool-Free Setup in Seconds】No hassle,no instructions needed. The intuitive quick-release mechanism lets you attach or detach the trolley handle in under 10 seconds—just click, lock, and go. Whether you're switching from car to classroom, or stowing it compactly for storage 【24+Pockets- Well Organization】Every item has its place. The roller laptop bag's front organizer features 4 accordion file pocket, 7 pen slots, and a wide accessory pocket. Inside: a document sleeve, 4 mesh elastic pockets, 2 top mesh zippered compartments, plus 2 side large stretch pockets fit large cup holder —no more messy mixes! 【Smart Top Buckle Design】Secures the lid to the handle when open, creating a stable workstation for easy access while preventing handle wobble—just like a mobile filing cabinet! › See more product details

Pre-heat your infrared sauna for home via the APP, or use the touchscreen panel to set the timer (1-60-min) and temperature (65-149°F). Enjoy your favorite podcasts or music through the built-in Bluetooth speaker for the ultimate relax sauna experience. 【Full-Body Wellness Benefits】Step into your personal dry sauna for home and let the 7 far infrared carbon heating panels gently elevate your core temperature. This deep, penetrating heat may help with muscle recovery, ease joint discomfort, promote relaxation, support detoxification, and contribute to overall cardiovascular health, making it one of the best home saunas for your daily routine. 【Space-Saving Corner Design & Premium Hemlock Wood】Engineered for modern living spaces, this corner sauna features a unique pentagon shape that tucks perfectly into any unused corner. Crafted from durable, beautiful Canadian hemlock wood, this wooden sauna is not only aesthetically pleasing but also built to last, resisting warping and cracking. 【Ultra-Low EMF & Safety Assured】Your health is our priority. Our low EMF sauna operates within a safe range of 0-5mG, ensuring peace of mind during every session. It features an automatic shut-off system and built-in ventilation. Please Note: The USB port is designed for media playback only. Using it to charge devices may cause damage to the control panel. 【Immersive Relaxation Ambiance & Insulated Cover】 The seven-color light therapy lamp creates the perfect atmosphere to soothe mind and body, while the LED reading light offers convenient functionality. The newly upgraded insulated cover, crafted from triple-layer thermal fabric, accelerates heating and maintains efficient warmth, fully unleashing the performance of this dual-person indoor infrared sauna. 【Warranty Coverage & Shipping Tips】We stand behind our product with a strong warranty: 1-Year Warranty on the wooden structure and 2-Year Warranty on electronic components (against manufacturing defects, excluding man-made damage or natural disasters). In the unlikely event of shipping damage, please follow the instructions in the Amazon message thread to provide the required photographic evidence. I will promptly reship a brand-new replacement part to ensure your complete satisfaction. › See more product details Brand KUNSANA Color Luxury Indoor Sauna 2-3 Person (Low EMF/App) Product Dimensions 43"L x 43"W x 70"H Material Wood Shape Rectangular

})); Cooling Comfort: This dog bed's elevated design increases airflow for all season comfort, keeping your pet cool even on hot days. The height is just right for dogs of all ages, from puppies to seniors. Indoor & Outdoor Use: Weather resistant, the 8" raised breathable mesh cot works great indoors and outside. Keep your pup dry and comfortable in the backyard, on the patio or porch, next to the pool, or while camping. Strong & Durable: Heavy-duty Teslin mesh holds up against scratching and chewing, providing excellent support and even pressure distribution to reduce joint and muscle pain. Easy Care: This cooling dog bed is super easy to clean. Wash the mesh with tap water, a hose, or a damp towel. For deeper cleaning, use a mild soap or natural all surface cleaner and rinse thoroughly. Quick Assembly: Set up takes just a few minutes. The lightweight design of this elevated dog bed provides increased portability and makes travel simple. › See more product details Brand Bedsure Breed Recommendation Large Special Feature Elevated,Cooling,Portable,Breathable,Lightweight,Weather Resistant,Travel,Non Skid Bottom Material Teslin mesh, Metal Product Dimensions 49"L x 31.5"W x 8"Th

Many users notice their skin looking smoother and more radiant shortly after use, with a refreshed, firmer feel that lasts. Is it safe for sensitive skin? Our formula is free from parabens, sulfates, alcohol, and artificial fragrance. It’s designed to be gentle and soothing, and many customers with sensitive skin enjoy using it. How often should I use the mask? We recommend 1–2 times per week for ongoing results. For special occasions, many users like to apply the night before for an extra boost. What makes this different from other sheet masks? Crafted with a high concentration of collagen, a two-piece custom-fit design, and a carefully balanced blend of peptides and hydration complexes — for results you can see and feel, without stickiness. (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("PremiumAplusModule"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) { P.when('premium-module-11-faq').execute(function(init){ init(); }); })); About this item Deep Overnight Hydration and Renewal: This Korean skin care overnight face mask is formulated to infuse your skin with concentrated moisture and essential nutrients while you sleep. Low molecular collagen and oligo hyaluronic acid help replenish hydration and support a softer, more supple texture by morning. Improves Skin Tone: This collagen face mask with niacinamide works to improve the look of uneven skin tone. Regular use helps reveal a more luminous, glass skin appearance that’s refreshed and hydrated. Nourishing Fermented Ingredients: Galactomyces ferment filtrate, derived from Korean fermentation technology, delivers beneficial nutrients to nourish and revitalize dull, tired skin. Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) supports the skin’s natural barrier, promoting a smoother, healthier-looking surface. This hydrating face mask is designed to complement any Korean beauty routine. Softens Rough Texture and Reduces Dullness: This advanced bio-collagen sheet mask helps to soften rough areas and visibly improve dullness, leaving skin feeling comfortable and revitalized. Perfect for achieving the look of smooth, radiant skin overnight. Lightweight, Hypoallergenic Formula for All Skin Types: Designed to be non-greasy and gentle, this overnight Korean collagen mask is free from parabens, sulfates, and synthetic dyes. Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene glycol, Betaine, Sodium carrageenan, Polyurethane-35, Glucomannan, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Pentylene glycol, Butylene glycol, Dipotassium glycyrrhizate, Matrine, Potassium chloride, Galactomyces ferment filtrate, Allantoin, Tocopheryl acetate, Niacinamide, Hydrolyzed collagen, Hydrolyzed sodium hyaluronate, Sodium hyaluronate, Hydroxyphenyl propamidobenzoic acid

}); })); Shared-bed friendly private listening. Trying to fall asleep to a podcast or calming audio while someone else is sleeping nearby? This pillow speaker for sleeping is designed for under pillow placement, so the sound stays close to you instead of filling the whole bedroom like a phone speaker. It’s a more considerate setup for a shared bed, roommates, or late-night listening—great for sleep music, audiobooks, podcasts, meditation, and relaxing bedtime routines. Ultra-thin 11mm comfort that doesn’t change your pillow. Most speakers feel bulky in bed and end up being annoying. This ultra-thin under pillow speaker (11mm) is made to stay low-profile and sit flat under your pillow—no big bump, no weird pillow shape, no constant readjusting. At just 1.5oz and 9.6cm wide, it’s a compact mini portable sleep speaker that feels simple and unobtrusive for nightly use at home, in a dorm, or while traveling. Two easy ways to play: Bluetooth Mode + built-in sleep sounds. Some nights you want your own playlist; other nights you just want something simple to drift off. Use Bluetooth Mode to stream from your phone (music, podcasts, audiobooks), then switch to Sleep Mode for built-in White Noise, Ocean Waves, and Rain Sounds—so you can keep the bedtime vibe going without staying on your screen or opening apps again. This “two-mode” setup is perfect for winding down, relaxing after a long day, or creating a consistent nighttime routine. Set it and forget it: Auto-Off Sleep Timer. Falling asleep with audio is great—waking up later to turn it off isn’t. With the auto-off sleep timer, you can choose 30/60/90 minutes and let the sleep pillow speaker shut off automatically while you drift off. It’s especially helpful if you listen to white noise, bedtime stories, or long podcasts and don’t want sound playing all night or waking you up later. Bluetooth 6.0 + nightly-ready battery. Built for everyday bedtime use: Bluetooth 6.0 helps pairing feel quick and the connection stay steady for smooth streaming. The 300mAh battery delivers up to 10 hours playback—enough for a full night routine—and USB-C charging makes it easy to recharge and use again tomorrow. And if anything isn’t right, just reach out—our support team will help you get it sorted. › See more product details Color Gray Brand Kinglucky Model Name X50 Manufacturer Kinglucky

Considering mini 10, small 20, medium 40, large 80. */ About this item 【FSA HSA Eligible】Ultimate Hand Relaxation - Snailax electric hand massager combines compression, optional vibration and heat soothing functions to provide you an enjoyable massage experience. It targets each acupuncture point of the fingers, palms and wrists with acupuncture massage, pressing four fingers rhythmically. In this way, every inch of your hand can be fully massaged. Vibration & Soothing Heat - Snailax hand massager machine provides optional vibration to soothe every inch of your sore muscles and soft tissues, effectively alleviating finger numbness, arthritis, joint pain, or carpal tunnel pain. The gentle heat can eliminate your fatigue and coldness, promotes blood circulation. 3 Massage Modes - Snailax cordless hand massager with heat offers 3 massage modes to meet different massage needs. Whether your hands are tired from manual labor, keyboarding, exercise, or cold in winter, this palm massager will pamper your hands. Simply press the control buttons, it will give you the closest feeling to a genuine hand massage. Wireless & Portable - Snailax rechargeable hand finger massager with built-in lithium battery can last 90 minutes after full charged. Portable and convenient to use at home, in the office, or during traveling. The built-in 10-minute timer makes sure the optimal massage duration and maximum benefits for your hands. Designed for Both Hands - Snailax hand massager tool is suitable for both left and right hands, and a full range of hand sizes. The open-ended design enables you to adjust your hand to the most comfortable massage position. Ideal healthy gift for women, men! This hand warmer massager comes with a 30-day free return, 12-month warranty for quality issues.

})); About this item ULTIMATE WELLNESS BRACELET: Experience the maximum power of our magnetic hematite and copper beads strung on durable marine-grade nylon string. Magnetic copper bracelets have been valued for centuries to help support balance, circulation, and overall comfort. More than just an accessory, this modern copper bracelet delivers 3x stronger magnetic strength while keeping you stylish and confident wherever life takes you. SOLID COPPER & HEMATITE BEADS: Crafted with authentic solid 8mm hematite and copper beads, this bracelet combines earthy warmth with a polished shine. Hematite is admired as a grounding stone known for its calming energy, while copper adds timeless style and elegance. Unlike plated designs, our bracelet uses real copper beads that can naturally develop a rich patina over time—you can clean it for a bright luster or let it age gracefully for a vintage look. ADJUSTABLE SIZE: Our copper bracelet for women or men is designed to accommodate wrist sizes between 5.75" - 8.0" (Small to Large). This copper bead bracelet features adjustable dangling string ends for a perfect and secure fit. The elegant beaded bracelet design makes it a versatile accessory for everyday wear. GIFT-READY PACKAGING: Arrives in a premium gift box complete with a velvet pouch and product guide, these magnetic bracelets for women are ready to impress from the moment it’s opened. It’s the perfect combination of elegance and functionality, making this hematite bracelet men an ideal gift for friends, family, and loved ones on birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, or any special occasion. QUALITY ASSURANCE & SUPPORT: MagnetRX is a trusted name in magnetic hematite and copper jewelry. Every bracelet is crafted with premium quality materials and backed by our customer support—if you’re not completely happy with your purchase, simply reach out and we’ll make it right.

This technology uses Therablend technology, it stretches your neck at just the right angle and decompress your cervical spine. Then, it deploys soothing heat massages to boost nutrient and oxygen rich blood flow. What makes this massage pillow better than any other ones? No other pillow has the combined capabilities of heat, vibration massage, AND dynamic memory foam all in one. This is what makes Thera Pillow the best on the market. I am a side-sleeper, can i still use this pillow? Absolutely! This pillow is specifically designed to support all sleep positions, including side sleeping. Its shape & firmness provide proper lumbar and spine alignment, allowing you to enjoy maximum comfort and restful sleep without compromise. How long should I use Thera Pillow for? We recommend starting with 15 minutes in the beginning. Thera Pillow's comfortable heat massage lasts for 15 - 20 minutes to give you the most comfortable heat and vibration massage. Soothing Heat Therapy That Lasts – Unlike ordinary heating pads, the Thera Pillow maintains a steady 40–50°C range, delivering consistent warmth that helps muscles relax, circulation improve, and tension fade away. Multiple Vibration Massage Modes – With rhythmic pulse patterns, pumping cycles, and continuous hum options, the massage pillow helps reduce stiffness, loosen knots, and leave your neck and shoulders refreshed. Pre-Balanced, Mold-Free Formula: Our fragrance oils are infused with essential oils and pre-balanced with purified water—no mixing, no dilution, no buildup. Just clean, consistent scent. Superior Quality & Design: This magnet bracelet showcases a symbolic four-leaf clover and sparkling CZ crystals. Crafted from surgical-grade (316L) stainless steel, it's waterproof, hypoallergenic, and built to resist tarnish for enduring beauty. Our innovative butterfly clasp allows easy wear and removal with a simple press, ensuring a secure hold that won’t open unexpectedly. Adjustable for The Perfect Fit: Our magnet bracelet for women arrives at 8.0" inches in length and includes a FREE sizing tool that allows you to remove/add links to make it the perfect fit for your wrist. Considering mini 10, small 20, medium 40, large 80. */ Mental Health Matters Shirt for Women Be Kind to Your Mind Letter Print Tshirt Women Oversized Human Mental Illness Awareness Tshirt Soft and skin-friendly and not easy to shrink or fade after washing Please select the appropriate size according to the size chart Fabric type 60% Cotton, 35% Polyester, 5% Spandex Care instructions Machine Wash, Hand Wash Only Origin Imported Closure type Pull On About this item Material and Size: S=US(4-6),M=US(8-10),L=US(12-14),XL=US(16),XXL=US(18-20). This cute mental health matters tee awareness graphic t-shirt is made of 60% Cotton, 35% Polyester, 5% Spandex, it is soft and skin-friendly. The right fit gives you comfortable wearing experience. EXCELLENT DESIGN: This human mental illness awareness T shirt adopts a classic round neck style, with a colorful mental health matters print on the back and the chest. The oversized design no longer constricts your torso and inspirational words can make you feel empowered and present in the world. OCCASION: The oversized and mental health colorful letter design is great for any outfit and any occasion and is a good choice for everyday outfit. The cute and unique loose graphic tee will make you the brightest star in the crowd. CUTE GIFT: You can make it the lovely gift for mama, sister, friend, supporters of mental health, victim of depression, mental health professionals, therapists, mental health nurses, school counselors, teacher and volunteer. Uplifting words will energize those around you. TIPS: Package include 1 x Cute Mental Health Matters T-Shirt for women. Recommended machine/hand wash and wash inside out and line dry. PLEASE DON'T PUT IT IN THE DRYER, DRY CLEAN, or BLEACH.

Personalized Faux Patchwork Shirt for Mom Grandma The Personalized Faux Patchwork Shirt with Grandkids Names is more than just a T-shirt—it's a heartfelt gift that combines creativity and family love. Featuring a unique faux patchwork design with vibrant pastel and floral patterns, this shirt can be customized with special nicknames such as GRANDMA, MAMA, NANA, GG, or any nickname of your choice. Add up to 10 grandkids’ names beneath the bold patchwork letters, creating a truly personal gift that is both meaningful and stylish. Why Choose This Shirt? This Custom Grandma Faux Patchwork Shirt makes a thoughtful and heartfelt gift that any grandmother, mother, or special lady will cherish. Whether you're celebrating Mother's Day, a birthday, or just want to give a gift that shows how much she means, this shirt delivers both style and sentiment. Personalized for You: Customize with any nickname like GRANDMA, MAMA, NANA, GG, or any nickname you desire. Add up to 10 grandkids' names for a completely unique design. Faux Patchwork Design: A beautiful combination of soft pastel tones and floral patterns that creates a vibrant, eye-catching effect on every shirt. Comfortable Fabric: Made with premium cotton-blend fabric (50% cotton, 50% polyester) for softness, breathability, and long-lasting durability. Versatile and Stylish: Perfect for any occasion – from casual family get-togethers to a special Mother’s Day or birthday celebration. Available in Multiple Sizes & Colors: From S to 4XL, with options in colors such as light blue, dusty pink, charcoal gray, and forest green, ensuring a perfect fit and color for everyone. Perfect for All Seasons Perfect for All Seasons With a variety of styles including Sweatshirts, T-shirts, Hoodies, and Ladies' T-shirts, these pieces are designed for comfort and versatility. Sweatshirt: Soft, cozy, and perfect for cooler weather. T-shirt: Lightweight, breathable, and easy to layer. Hoodie: Warm, comfortable, and ideal for chilly days. Ladies' T-shirt: Elegant, casual, and perfect for any season. Custom Fabric for Every Weather Made with premium fabrics, these garments offer comfort, breathability, and style to suit any season. Material & Care Instructions: This Custom Grandma Faux Patchwork Shirt is made from a durable cotton-blend fabric that is easy to care for – simply machine wash cold and tumble dry low, ensuring it stays soft, vibrant, and ready to wear for years to come. We  real S925 products, and the product withstands any kind of S925 test. The necklace for women is plated with rose gold on the outside layer. 【Women Necklaces Engraved with I Love you Always and Forever】The quote is romantic and heartwarming. You can say this to your wife or lover to show your eternal love, and to your daughter the selfless love. Great necklace gifts for wife, girlfriend, mom, grandma, daughter, etc. 【 Heart Shaped Pendant - Heart Love Gifts for Women】The rose gold necklace is inlaid with a heart cubic zirconia stone that is 2X bigger than competitors'. Just as you know, the pendant is a big one, not in dainty style. But the receiver won't be disappointed since the real necklace is charming! 【Necklaces for Women - Ready to be Gifted with a Jewelry Box and Gift Bag】The simulant diamond necklace makes a perfect jewelry gift for Mothers Day, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, birthday, wedding, anniversary. It is a necklace for women that can be cherished for the whole life. In case of any questions, contact Gifon and we will be glad to help. 【12 Colors of Birthstones for 12 Months】The rose gold birthstone necklace makes a perfect birthday gift for her. Garnet stone for Jan, Amethyst for Feb, Aquamarine for March, Diamond for Apr, Emerald for May, Alexandrite for June, Ruby for July, Peridot for Aug, Sapphire for Sept, Tourmaline for Oct, Citrine for Nov, Turquoise for Dec.

- [Apron — "Mom's Cooking is Always the Best" Heart & Crown Kitchen Apron--Perfect for Mother's Day, or Mom's Birthday or any Special day.](https://tcou.net/products/apron-moms-cooking-is-always-the-best-heart-crown-kitchen-apron-perfect-for-mothers-day-or-moms-birthday-or-any-special-day): This apron brings warmth to the kitchen with a playful, heartfelt design that celebrates mom’s cooking. Lightweight but durable polyester canvas carries a rich black background dotted with tiny crowns and hearts, while the bright gold lettering reads “Mom’s Cooking is Always the Best...” — a simple, affectionate statement that lands like a smile. The fabric’s fine weave and foamed lining feel soft against the body and resist everyday stains, so it stays looking cheerful through messy meal prep, art projects, or backyard grilling. The adjustable tie-back closure and one-size layout give an easy, comfortable fit for a range of cooks. Choose from five strap colors — black, white, beige, blue, or pink — to match personality or kitchen style. Assembled in the USA from globally sourced parts and finished with a sewn-in care label and white hem thread, this apron blends sentiment with practical use for home cooks who like their tools to be bright, comfortable, and a little bit fun.Product features- 100% polyester canvas with foamed lining for a soft, fine-weave feel- Stain-resistant surface to protect clothes during cooking, crafting, or grilling- Tie-back closure and one-size fit (31.5" x 25.6" / 80cm x 65cm) for comfortable wear- Vibrant, high-definition printing; five strap color options (black, white, beige, blue, pink)- Assembled in the USA with sewn-in care label and durable white hem threadCare instructions- Do not dryclean- Do not iron- Tumble dry: low heat- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), gentle cycle

A high-quality AT-3600L cartridge ensures clear details, deep bass, and minimal distortion from your vinyl records. Bluetooth Input & Output: Stream music wirelessly from your phone or tablet to the turntable’s built-in speakers, or send the sound of your vinyl records to Bluetooth headphones or speakers. This Bluetooth record player lets you enjoy music your way – with no cords holding you back. Built-In Preamp & Versatile Connectivity: Hook up the ONE-S to your own sound system using the integrated phono preamp – no external amplifier needed. Switchable PHONO/LINE outputs, a 3.5mm AUX input give you multiple ways to listen, whether it’s through your big home speakers or a private session on your headphones. Easy Setup & Operation: The tonearm’s counterweight is pre-set for optimal tracking force, protecting your records and simplifying setup. This belt-driven turntable offers stable playback at 33⅓ and 45 RPM (45 adapter included) and features an auto-stop function for convenient, worry-free listening. Just unbox, plug in, and enjoy your favorite records. Vintage Design, Modern Convenience: The retro wood-grain finish and mid-century style make the ONE-S a beautiful addition to any room’s décor. Enjoy the nostalgia of a vintage record player paired with modern features like Bluetooth. It’s a great conversation piece and the perfect gift for vinyl lovers of all ages. › See more product details Brand Qlearsoul Maximum Rotational Speed 45 RPM Included Components (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("DetailPageProductOverviewTemplatesJava"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) { P.when('A').execute(function(A){ A.on('a:truncate:po-attribute-truncate-2:updated', function(data) { var isTruncated = !data.truncateInstance.getIfTextFits(); var seeMoreElement = document.getElementById('po-attribute-see-more-id-2'); if(seeMoreElement) { seeMoreElement.style.display = isTruncated ? DIY STEPS 1,Match the numbers on the paint with numbers on the canvas and fill them in. 2,Paint one color at time from largest areas to smallest ones. 3,Finish one color,then the next one. 4,Get it dry. - [T-Shirt-Tie-Dye Tee — "I Believe In ME!" Spiral Graphic T-Shirt](https://tcou.net/products/spiral-tie-dye-tee-i-believe-in-me-inspirational-rainbow-t-shirt): “I Believe In ME! I can do anything I set my mind to.” — with a cheerful little character anchoring the design to this fun and colorful T-Shirt. A bright, spiral tie-dye tee that feels like a small celebration every time you pull it on. The vivid swirl of blues, reds, greens, and purples wraps around a playful message — It’s lightweight enough for easy layering in cooler months and breathes well on warm days. Wear it to class, the park, or a weekend market and let the colors do the talking: confident, quirky, and unpretentiously joyful. Slight color variations from the dyeing process make each shirt its own one-of-a-kind piece, adding personality to casual outfits and letting the wearer express a bright, self-assured mood.Product features- 100% preshrunk cotton for a smooth, durable feel- Double-needle sleeve and neck hems for reinforced edges- Shoulder-to-shoulder twill tape to prevent stretching- Medium-weight fabric (5.3 oz / 180 g/m²) with classic fit- Runs true to size; slight color variations make each piece uniqueCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: low heat- Iron, steam, or dry: low heat- Do not dry-clean S M L XL 2XL Width, in 17.99 20.00 21.97 23.98 25.98 Length, in 28.50 29.49 30.51 31.50 32.52 Sleeve length, in 7.24 7.76 8.23 8.74 9.25

{margin-bottom: 0!important;} .aplus-v2 .aplus-standard .read-more-arrow-placeholder {text-align: right; cursor: pointer; display:none;} Choose either a single camera (they are sold at random) or buy the whole set and share with family or friends. Mini Digi Cam inspired by the KODAK Fling in the 80s In 1987, KODAK launched its first signature single-use camera, the KODAK Fling, aiming to promote the simplicity of point-and-shoot photography. Fast forward to today, the all-new KODAK Charmera reimagines that retro charm with a digital twist. Compact enough to fit on your keychain, and brings back the joy of everyday snapshots. This tiny digi cam supports both photo taking and video recording. Date stamp function, and also 4 vintage Kodak frames and 7 special filters are available. What makes it even more exciting? The cameras are sold in blind boxes, whether it's a party gift, a collectible item, or a shared surprise among friends, it adds an element of surprise and fun! With 7 uniquely vintage designs, including 1 secret edition, every unboxing is a mystery awaiting to be revealed! * The secret edition features a transparent shell that shows off the camera’s inner workings — a nod to retro-tech minimalism that’s sleek, see-through, and seriously cool! 4 vintage Kodak frames, 7 special filters, date stamp available With built-in photo frames featuring vintage elements like the KODAK icons and film-style borders, every shot gets that iconic, nostalgic touch - no editing needed. Just shoot and share instantly. Turn every moment into a celebration of fun and nostalgia! By attaching the keychain camera to your bag, it is a charm and a camera as one, perfect for snapping street scenes, recording party highlights or making selfies, capturing your quality moments! The mini cam and blind box all in one! Package includes KODAK CHARMERA Keychain Digital Camera Charging USB-C cable Keyring Product features Support photo taking and video recording 4 frames and 7 filters available in photo mode 1440 x 1080 image output; 1.6M megapixels Support 1GB-128GB TF memory card Rechargeable battery Product Specifications Image sensor ¼ inch CMOS Lens 35mm; f/2.4 Plug USB-C Screen size 0.96 inch Image output 1440 x 1080 image output; 1.6M megapixels Image JPEG Frame rate 30 fps Video format AVI Storage Micro SD (1GB-128GB) Battery Rechargeable 200mAH User level Age 15+ Dimensions 58(W) x 24.5(H) x 20(D) mm Weight 30(g) Material ABS Frequently Asked Questions SD Card Compatibility We suggest using a brand-new SD card (1GB–128GB). If using a pre-owned card, please format it first. Cards with memory less than 1GB are not supported for recording. *Memory card is not included in the package, customers have to purchase it on their own. Screen Appearance The screen comes with a protective film. Please remove this film before use to reveal the clear display underneath. Quick Start Troubleshooting Please try these three steps: 1. Ensure the camera is fully charged. 2. Test with a different, formatted memory card. 3. Perform a factory reset using the Reset Hole. Orders & Support For all delivery inquiries or post-purchase support, please contact Amazon CS directly for assistance within 30 days of purchase. Specification: Product Name: Cellulite Leggings Fabric Composition: Nylon Lining Composition: Spandex Fabric Weaving Method: Knitted Style: Fitted Package Includes: 1 PCS * 3D Cellulite Leggings Notes: 1.Due to Manual Measurements, Please Allow Slight Measurement Deviations. 2. Due to the Different Display and Lighting Effects, The Actual Color of the Item May Be Slightly Different from the Color Displayed in the Picture. Fabric type Polyamide Care instructions Machine Wash Origin Imported Closure type Pull On About this item 【360° 3D Textured Fabric for a Flattering Look】Designed with a unique 3D textured pattern, these leggings create a visually smoothing effect that enhances your natural curves. Unlike basic flat fabrics, the structured texture helps provide a more sculpted and confident look from every angle. 【Scrunch Design for Natural Lift】Featuring a carefully designed scrunch detail, these leggings help accentuate your natural shape and create a lifted, contoured appearance. The supportive structure enhances your silhouette without compromising comfort. 【High-Waisted Tummy Control Support】The wide high-rise waistband offers gentle compression to help smooth your midsection and provide a secure fit. Designed to stay in place without rolling, it delivers a streamlined look for workouts or everyday wear. 【Ultra-Soft, Moisture-Wicking & Seamless Comfort】Designed for all-day wear, these 3D compression leggings are crafted from a buttery-soft, breathable fabric blend that feels like a second skin. The seamless flatlock design helps reduce chafing and irritation, ensuring smooth, comfortable wear during workouts, daily activities, or under clothing. Featuring moisture-wicking technology and four-way stretch, they keep you cool, dry, and fully supported while moving with your body. 【 Versatile Style from Yoga to Everyday Wear】Whether you're flowing through downward dog or running weekend errands, these leggings are your versatile wardrobe essential. They combine the targeted benefits of compression leggings with a stylish, seamless look that pairs perfectly with any top. Durable enough for the gym and chic enough for the street, they're designed to move with you all day long.

- [TCoU-Take Care of You Heart Keychain — Gentle Reminder of Self Love with Sunset Hands Love Photo Keyring](https://tcou.net/products/tcou-take-care-of-you-heart-keychain-gentle-reminder-of-self-love-with-sunset-hands-love-photo-keyring): A small stainless steel heart keychain that carries a quiet warmth reminder to "Take Care of YOU". The polished metal frame holds a glossy photo insert of two hands forming a heart against a golden sunset, catching light as you move it. It feels solid but feather-light in a pocket. Use it on keys, backpacks, or hung from a zipper to keep a private reminder close — a daily reminder of someone or someplace that matters.This piece blends durability with a soft, sentimental look. The stainless steel resists rust and keeps the shine through everyday use. Its compact size slips into pockets or purse compartments without adding bulk, and the smooth edges make it gentle to carry. Whether tucked into a travel bag on a weekend escape or clipped to daily keys, it turns small moments into something you can hold.Product features- Durable stainless steel resists rust and corrosion- Compact heart-shaped design fits pockets and bags- Lightweight and smooth for comfortable everyday carry One size Width, in 1.57 Height, in 2.83 Care instructions- Clean with a dry cloth

- [Saying No Is Self-Care T-shirt — Mindful Self-Love Graphic T-Shirt](https://tcou.net/products/saying-no-is-self-care-tee-mindful-self-love-graphic-t-shirt): Being Nice Becomes Self-Neglect when we say yes but should have said no S M L XL 2XL Length, in 22.75 24.75 26.50 28.00 30.00 Width, in 26.75 27.25 29.25 31.25 31.25 Sleeve length, in 10.25 10.50 11.50 11.50 11.75 Size tolerance, in 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00 . Saying No Is Self-Care. It is part of taking care of you. This T-Shirt says exactly that as a reminder to you and others around you that you need to say no sometimes to take care of you. Soft, relaxed-fit tee that speaks gently and clearly. This garment-dyed shirt carries a calming message—"Saying No Is Self-Care"—front and center in an elegant serif layout with subtle botanical accents. The muted, vintage-washed color and slightly oversized drop-shoulder silhouette make it feel lived-in from the first wear. It’s the kind of shirt you reach for on heavy days: to set a boundary, to breathe, to move through your errands or cozy up at home. The small, graceful logo on the upper back keeps the design thoughtful and understated. Wear it with your favorite jeans, a cardigan, or layered under a jacket when you need a quiet reminder to prioritize yourself.Product features- 100% USA cotton with a durable, smooth knit- Garment-dyed for a soft hand and vintage-washed color- Drop-shoulder, relaxed silhouette with forward-stitched shoulder seam- Medium-weight 7.5 oz fabric with double-needle stitched collar- Assembled in the USA; tear-away label for comfortCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: gentle cycle, low heat

- [Nice Isn't Always Kind T-Shirt— Mindful Self-Love Graphic T-Shirt](https://tcou.net/products/saying-no-is-self-care-tee-mindful-self-love-graphic-t-shirt-1): Most of us were taught to be nice. Fewer of us were taught how to be kind in a way that includes honesty, boundaries, and courage. Nice is easy to give.Kindness takes intention. But kindness is what people remember. It’s what builds trust, strengthens relationships, and creates real impact — in leadership, in business, and in life. S M L XL 2XL Length, in 22.75 24.75 26.50 28.00 30.00 Width, in 26.75 27.25 29.25 31.25 31.25 Sleeve length, in 10.25 10.50 11.50 11.50 11.75 Size tolerance, in 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00 This T-Shirt says exactly that as a reminder to you and others around you that you need to say no sometimes to take care of you. Soft, relaxed-fit tee that speaks gently and clearly. This garment-dyed shirt carries a calming message—"Saying No Is Self-Care"—front and center in an elegant serif layout with subtle botanical accents. The muted, vintage-washed color and slightly oversized drop-shoulder silhouette make it feel lived-in from the first wear. It’s the kind of shirt you reach for on heavy days: to set a boundary, to breathe, to move through your errands or cozy up at home. The small, graceful logo on the upper back keeps the design thoughtful and understated. Wear it with your favorite jeans, a cardigan, or layered under a jacket when you need a quiet reminder to prioritize yourself.Product features- 100% USA cotton with a durable, smooth knit- Garment-dyed for a soft hand and vintage-washed color- Drop-shoulder, relaxed silhouette with forward-stitched shoulder seam- Medium-weight 7.5 oz fabric with double-needle stitched collar- Assembled in the USA; tear-away label for comfortCare instructions- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)- Do not bleach- Tumble dry: gentle cycle, low heat

}); })); How heavy should my weighted blanket be? We recommend choosing a weighted blanket that’s around 10% of your overall body weight. If you’re in between weights, it’s best to round down to the lighter weight, especially if this is your first time trying a weighted blanket! How long does it take to get used to sleeping under weight? We recommend using the Napper for less than 2 hours during the first three days and gradually increasing the usage until you build up to a full night’s rest. After around ten days, you should begin to experience the benefits of restorative rest. How are Bearaby’s weighted blanket different from other weighted blankets? Unlike conventional weighted blankets, our Nappers are weighted with layer upon layer of sustainable fabric — no artificial fillers or plastic pellets. The hand-knitted design distributes weight evenly and allows air to circulate through the night! Are your blankets machine washable? You can machine wash your Napper separately in cool water on a delicate cycle. After washing, tumble dry your Napper on low – it may take a few cycles to fully dry. Check your machine’s weight capacity before washing, and avoid top-loading machines. (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("PremiumAplusModule"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) { P.when('premium-module-11-faq').execute('invoke-premium-11-faq', function(init){ init(); }); })); Cotton SUSTAINABLE COTTON: Introducing our sustainable handcrafted Napper, the ultimate sleeping companion for those who value comfort and sustainability. Pure cotton and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 , the Napper is soft, gentle, and environmentally friendly. EVENLY WEIGHTED FOR DEEPER SLEEP: The soft, breathable fabric is perfect for all seasons, providing a comfortable sleeping experience no matter the weather. The soft, patented*, hand-knit design allows this cooling weighted blanket to help you rest comfortably and avoid artificial fillers, making it a more sustainable option than traditional weighted blankets. *U.S. 10,835,708; U.S. 11,260,200; U.S. 11,806,480 GENTLE: Designed for relaxation and comfort, the Napper helps you to rest better after a long day, allowing you to sleep peacefully throughout the night. With its machine-washable design, this high quality weighted blanket makes for a convenient daily companion. MACHINE WASHABLE:  in the ultimate handcrafted Napper for an eco-friendly, high quality weighted blanket that makes for a long-lasting daily companion. Say goodbye to synthetic and low-grade materials and hello to an enduring option that you can feel good about. PICK YOUR WEIGHT: It's best to choose a weighted blanket that’s around 10% of your overall body weight, depending on your individual snuggle preference! If you’re in between weight options, we recommend rounding up to the heavier weight to experience the full benefits of Deep Touch Pressure (DTP). › See more product details Material Cotton Color Midnight Blue Brand Bearaby Special Feature Breathable Style Modern
